architectural_purpose: deterministic coordination transition compatibility reasoning without orchestration execution

classification_semantics.compatible: all required references exist and no conflicts or non-safe markers are present
classification_semantics.incompatible: deterministic conflicts exist between transition compatibility references
classification_semantics.incomplete: required source, destination, provenance, continuity, or evidence references are missing
classification_semantics.partially_compatible: some guarantees pass while localized conflicts remain fail-visible
classification_semantics.prohibited: requested behavior violates hard non-execution boundaries
classification_semantics.unknown: compatibility semantics cannot be deterministically interpreted
classification_semantics.unsupported: compatibility reasoning is outside current deterministic scope

compatibility semantics cannot be deterministically interpreted
compatibility reasoning domain is outside current deterministic scope

conflict_semantics.boundary_conflict: boundary classifications or governance requirements conflict
conflict_semantics.continuity_conflict: replay, rollback, provenance, or evidence continuity chains conflict
conflict_semantics.explainability_conflict: explainability context is ambiguous or insufficient
conflict_semantics.provenance_conflict: source or destination provenance chains conflict
conflict_semantics.unsupported_state_conflict: known state or reasoning domain is unsupported
